0.content:
# CI/CD & Orbital

Integration test runs from Orbital (local-docker-container) and GitHub Actions (github-workflow) across all [dynatrace-wwse](https://github.com/dynatrace-wwse) enablement repos.

[← Overview](https://geu80787.apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/27ea9191-533f-4911-89ae-ef96fe63c7ef) · [Instantiations →](https://geu80787.apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/48b50182-c097-47a3-b864-1b72eb234946)

1.title: Total CI Runs
1.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter in(content.codespace.type, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| summarize total = count()

2.title: Pass Rate %
2.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter in(content.codespace.type, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| summarize total = count(), passed = countIf(content.codespace.errors == "0")
| fieldsAdd passRate = round(toDouble(passed) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 1)
| fields passRate

3.title: Orbital Runs
3.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter content.codespace.type == "local-docker-container"
| summarize total = count()

4.title: GitHub Actions Runs
4.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter content.codespace.type == "github-workflow"
| summarize total = count()

5.title: Failed Runs
5.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter in(content.codespace.type, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| summarize failed = countIf(content.codespace.errors != "0")

6.title: CI Runs Over Time
6.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter in(content.codespace.type, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| makeTimeseries count = count(), by: { content.codespace.type }, interval: 1d

7.title: Pass vs Fail Over Time
7.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter in(content.codespace.type, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| makeTimeseries passed = countIf(content.codespace.errors == "0"), failed = countIf(content.codespace.errors != "0"), interval: 1d

8.title: Runs by Repository
8.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter in(content.codespace.type, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| summarize count = count(), by: { content.repository.name }
| sort count desc
| limit 25

9.title: Run Type
9.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter in(content.codespace.type, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| summarize count = count(), by: { content.codespace.type }

10.title: Architecture
10.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter in(content.codespace.type, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| summarize count = count(), by: { content.codespace.arch }

11.title: Failures by Repository
11.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter in(content.codespace.type, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| filter content.codespace.errors != "0"
| summarize count = count(), by: { content.repository.name }
| sort count desc
| limit 20

12.title: Failure Details
12.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter in(content.codespace.type, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| filter content.codespace.errors != "0"
| fields timestamp, content.repository.name, content.codespace.type, content.codespace.arch, content.codespace.errors
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 50

13.title: Pass Rate by Repository
13.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter in(content.codespace.type, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| summarize total = count(), passed = countIf(content.codespace.errors == "0"), failed = countIf(content.codespace.errors != "0"), by: { content.repository.name }
| fieldsAdd passRate = round(toDouble(passed) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 1)
| sort total desc
| limit 25
